description: Self-improvement waves for the 340B executive dashboard. Run waves in order; each wave updates files and increments version.

waves.name: Architecture & Data Validation
prompts: Ensure folder structure: config/, data/, analytics/, ui/, docs/, self_upgrade/.
Validate STATE_340B vs STATE_NAMES; log and surface validation warnings.
Keep dataset-metadata.js in sync with state-data.js (lastUpdated, version).
Display About Data panel with provenance, timestamp, methodology, download link.

waves.name: Analytics & Executive Metrics
prompts: Add year-over-year trends, policy adoption timeline, national benchmarks.
Add executive summary panel: key figures upfront ($7.95B, 72 PA hospitals).
Ensure POLICY_INSIGHTS and applyPolicyInsights() feed the national strip.
Document metric definitions for CEO readability.

waves.name: UX/UI & Interactivity
prompts: State filter dropdown synced with filter buttons; ranked state table by year.
Interactive map with hover tooltips and state highlights.
Responsive design; professional palette and typography; smooth transitions.
Executive overview section with key findings upfront.

waves.name: Performance & Security
prompts: Lazy load below-the-fold panels; minimize globals; efficient loops.
Sanitize dynamic content (safeText); no innerHTML with data.
Safe JSON parsing with try/catch; external links rel='noopener noreferrer'.
Centralize config in config/settings.js; log security events if needed.

waves.name: Self-Upgrading Ultra Prompts
prompts: Read ultra_prompts.json; execute waves in order; log each change with timestamp.
Increment version after each wave; keep backup in data/archive/.
Validate updates before applying; auto-generate maintenance notes per wave.
Integrate with OPERATIONS_MANUAL: how to run self-update.

waves.name: Documentation & Maintenance
prompts: README: overview, architecture, dependencies, usage for novice maintainers.
OPERATIONS_MANUAL: add/update data, run self-update waves, update charts/UI, republish.
PROMPTS.md: document ultra_prompts workflow and example cycles.
Inline comments in all files for maximum clarity.

waves.name: Self-Improvement Manager
prompts: Read ultra_prompts.json and generate improvement cycles.
Track versioning and update data/archive/upgrade-log.json.
Ensure data/archive exists for backups and agent logs.

waves.name: Documentation & Operations
prompts: Generate operations manual updates; comment new code; maintain README, PROMPTS, SECURITY.

waves.name: Cross-Agent Validation
prompts: Compare proposals from all agents; resolve conflicts; prioritize by executive impact, maintainability, security, performance.
Approve changes before integration; output approved-changes JSON.

waves.name: CEO Executive Experience Audit
prompts: Simulate executive use; score clarity, polish, decision-readiness.
Suggest refinements to layout, metrics, and interactivity.
